member.name: P:Plugin.Firebase.CloudMessaging.CrossFirebaseCloudMessaging.IsSupported
member.summary: Gets if the plugin is supported on the current platform.

member.name: T:Plugin.Firebase.CloudMessaging.IFirebaseCloudMessaging
member.summary: Firebase Messaging lets you reliably deliver messages at no cost. To send or receive messages, the app must get a registration token from InstanceID. This token authorizes an app server to send messages to an app instance.

member.name: M:Plugin.Firebase.CloudMessaging.IFirebaseCloudMessaging.CheckIfValidAsync
member.summary: Checks whether device is able to receive cloud messages and if the user has granted the permissions for it.

member.name: M:Plugin.Firebase.CloudMessaging.IFirebaseCloudMessaging.OnTokenRefreshAsync
member.summary: Call it when the token was refreshed.

member.name: M:Plugin.Firebase.CloudMessaging.IFirebaseCloudMessaging.GetTokenAsync
member.summary: Asynchronously gets the default FCM registration token. This creates a Firebase Installations ID, if one does not exist, and sends information about the application and the device to the Firebase backend. A network connection is required for the method to succeed.

member.name: M:Plugin.Firebase.CloudMessaging.IFirebaseCloudMessaging.SubscribeToTopicAsync(System.String)
member.summary: Asynchronously subscribes to a topic. This uses the default FCM registration token to identify the app instance and periodically sends data to the Firebase backend.
member.param: The name of the topic, for example, @“sports”.

member.name: M:Plugin.Firebase.CloudMessaging.IFirebaseCloudMessaging.UnsubscribeFromTopicAsync(System.String)
member.summary: Asynchronously unsubscribe from a topic. This uses a FCM Token to identify the app instance and periodically sends data to the Firebase backend.
member.param: The name of the topic, for example @“sports”.

member.name: M:Plugin.Firebase.CloudMessaging.IFirebaseCloudMessaging.OnNotificationReceived(Plugin.Firebase.CloudMessaging.FCMNotification)
member.summary: Call it when a fcm notification was received.

member.name: E:Plugin.Firebase.CloudMessaging.IFirebaseCloudMessaging.TokenChanged
member.summary: Gets invoked when the fcm registration token has changed.

member.name: E:Plugin.Firebase.CloudMessaging.IFirebaseCloudMessaging.NotificationReceived
member.summary: Gets invoked when a new fcm notification was received.

member.name: E:Plugin.Firebase.CloudMessaging.IFirebaseCloudMessaging.NotificationTapped
member.summary: Gets invoked when a received fcm notification was tapped by the user.

member.name: E:Plugin.Firebase.CloudMessaging.IFirebaseCloudMessaging.Error
member.summary: Gets invoked when something went wrong during the validity check.

member.name: T:Plugin.Firebase.CloudMessaging.Resource
member.summary: Android Resource Designer class. Exposes the Android Resource designer assembly into the project Namespace.
